title: lilium callosum var. callosum
intro: Lilium callosum var. callosum, also known as the Callosum Lily, is a species of lily that is native to Japan and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The Callosum Lily is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Lilium callosum var. callosum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and poultices for topical application.
